Text.Page:
Taking care of refugees is all well and good, but it'd be better if we turned them back into "people with homes and jobs," eh?

And that means extending our reach beyond Fey Forest into the rest of the region. We've sent some folk to check out the deserted homestead. Balter should be there. Go check on them.
Thank the gods you're here, <PCCLASS:lcase>! I thought Lumbertown forgot all about us.
